step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the selection of option D (Mollusc shell). While other options might seem plausible initially—such as pinna being part of an ear structure or hooves having some mineral content—their primary composition does not primarily involve significant incorporation of metallic minerals through biomineralization processes similar to those found in mollusk shells. raw_response:
I agree with the selection of option D (Mollusc shell). While other options might seem plausible initially—such as pinna being part of an ear structure or hooves having some mineral content—their primary composition does not primarily involve significant incorporation of metallic minerals through biomineralization processes similar to those found in mollusk shells. Therefore, my final answer remains consistent with Option D. 

Answer Choice: **D**.
